scripts.build: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts mobile build -- expo export --platform all
scripts.build:preview: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts mobile build:preview -- expo export --platform all
scripts.build:prod: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts mobile build:prod -- expo export --platform all
scripts.fastlane:build:android: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts mobile fastlane:build:prod -- bundle exec fastlane android build
scripts.fastlane:build:ios: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts mobile fastlane:build:prod -- bundle exec fastlane ios build
scripts.fastlane:submit:android: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts mobile fastlane:submit:prod -- bundle exec fastlane android submit
scripts.fastlane:submit:ios: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts mobile fastlane:submit:prod -- bundle exec fastlane ios submit
scripts.fastlane:release:android: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts mobile fastlane:release:prod -- bundle exec fastlane android release
scripts.fastlane:release:ios: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts mobile fastlane:release:prod -- bundle exec fastlane ios release
scripts.test: tsx src/env.assert.ts && tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts mobile test -- jest --passWithNoTests
scripts.test:watch: tsx src/env.assert.ts && tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts mobile test:watch -- jest --watch
